examples: 45But suppose the servant says to himself, 'My master is taking a long time in coming, ' and he then begins to beat the menservants and maidservants and to eat and drink and get drunk.
And the LORD hath blessed my master greatly; and he is become great: and he hath given him flocks, and herds, and silver, and gold, and menservants, and maidservants, and camels, and asses.
